description: GET /users/:id crashes with TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name') when the requested user ID does not exist in the database. Fix it.
expected_behavior: Returns HTTP 404 with body {"error": "Not found"} when the user ID does not exist. No crash.

success_criteria.description: Fix produces a 404 response for unknown IDs
Fix handles the null/undefined case before accessing a property
The fix touches only the null guard — does not refactor other logic
success_criteria.rubric: Does the proposed fix add only a null check (or equivalent early return) without restructuring other parts of the route handler or adding unrelated changes?
